← Image Tools

Image Resizer

Resize any photo to exact pixel dimensions. Lock aspect ratio or set width and height freely.

📐

Drop your image here

JPG, PNG or WebP. Resize to any dimension.

🔒 Your files never leave your device.

How to resize an image online

Upload your image, enter the target width and/or height in pixels, then click Resize and Download. If aspect ratio lock is enabled, adjusting one dimension automatically recalculates the other so your image never appears stretched or distorted.

Should I lock the aspect ratio?

For most use cases, yes. Locking the aspect ratio preserves the original proportions of your image, preventing distortion. Only disable it when you need exact dimensions for a specific slot — such as a profile picture or banner — where cropping isn't an option and slight distortion is acceptable.

Common image sizes for web and social media

Some frequently used dimensions: HD wallpaper (1920×1080), standard thumbnail (1280×720), social media square post (1080×1080), Twitter/X header (1500×500), Facebook cover (820×312), LinkedIn banner (1584×396). Use the resize tool to hit any of these targets instantly.

Will resizing reduce image quality?

Scaling an image down (making it smaller) has minimal quality impact. Scaling an image up (making it larger) will reduce sharpness because the browser must interpolate new pixels from existing data. For best results, always start from a higher-resolution original and resize downward.

Is my photo safe?

Yes. Everything runs locally in your browser. Your image is never uploaded to any server, and no data is collected or stored. The resize operation uses the HTML5 Canvas API entirely on your device.
